phases.name: Real-time Backend Integration & Core Environmental Monitoring
phases.goal: Connect the mock backend to real hardware protocols and set up historical databases.

phases.name: Power Chain & Efficiency Management
phases.goal: Analyze tracked data into meaningful efficiency metrics including PUE and Outlet level insights.

phases.name: Comprehensive Asset & Capacity Management
phases.goal: Upgrade "Rack Designer" with IT asset databases and detailed spatial/wiring maps.

phases.name: Advanced Visualization & Analytics
phases.goal: Render a modern 3D server room with overlapping analytical representations like heatmaps.

phases.name: Security & Access Control
phases.goal: Add physical data center security measures alongside software boundary scopes.
